items.title: More Fed Interest Rate Cuts: Yielding Independence To Stay Independent
items.description: Fed Chair Powell said that the Fed was not on a fixed course but would watch the data as they emerge. However, we cannot ignore politics: President Trump wants to see lower interest rates.

items.title: Fed's 25 Bps Cut May Backfire Spectacularly
items.description: Inflation is reaccelerating, with CPI and shelter costs rising. Read why rate cuts may further fuel housing and equity market bubbles.
